showResult.description: Show the result of the shortcut

setVariable.description: Set the value of a variable

getVariable.description: Get the value of a variable

statistics.description: Calculate statistics on a list of numbers

convertMeasurement.description: Convert a measurement to different units

downloadURL.description: Download the contents of a URL

getURLHeaders.description: Get HTTP headers from a URL

getWebPageContents.description: Get the contents of a web page

getArticle.description: Get article content from a URL

runJavaScriptOnWebPage.description: Run JavaScript on the current Safari web page

getRSSFeed.description: Get items from an RSS feed

searchMaps.description: Search for a location in Maps

getItemFromList.description: Get an item from a list by index

chooseFromList.description: Choose an item from a list

count.description: Count items in a list or characters in text

getItemName.description: Get the name of an item

setItemName.description: Set the name of an item

getItemType.description: Get the type of an item

getDictionaryValue.description: Get a value from a dictionary by key

setDictionaryValue.description: Set a value in a dictionary

matchText.description: Match text using a regular expression

showDefinition.description: Show the definition of a word

getEmojiName.description: Get the name of an emoji

waitToReturn.description: Wait for user to return to Shortcuts

getCurrentDate.description: Get the current date and time

adjustDate.description: Adjust a date by adding or subtracting time

getHalfwayPoint.description: Get halfway point between two locations

getMapsLink.description: Get a Maps URL for a location

getFileLink.description: Get a sharing link for a file

moveFile.description: Move a file to a new location

getContentsOfFolder.description: Get the contents of a folder

scanDocument.description: Scan a document using the camera

previewDocument.description: Preview a document with Quick Look

getMyShortcuts.description: Get a list of your shortcuts

openShortcut.description: Open a shortcut in the editor

comment.description: Add a comment (no effect on execution)

scanBarcode.description: Scan a QR code or barcode

handoff.description: Continue on another device via Handoff

addToReadingList.description: Add URL to Safari Reading List

takePhoto.description: Take a photo with the camera

takeVideo.description: Take a video with the camera

saveToPhotos.description: Save an image or video to Photos

getImageFrames.description: Get frames from an animated image

addToPlaylist.description: Add a song to a playlist

selectContact.description: Select contacts from the address book

showInStore.description: Show an item in the App Store or iTunes Store

getHomeState.description: Get the state of a HomeKit accessory

createNote.description: Create a new note in Notes app

appendToNote.description: Append text to an existing note

useModel.description: Use Apple Intelligence model to process a prompt

summarize.description: Summarize text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools

rewriteText.description: Rewrite text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools (iOS 26+)

proofread.description: Proofread text using Apple Intelligence Writing Tools (iOS 26+)

createImage.description: Create an image using Image Playground (iOS 26+)

repeat.description: Repeat a fixed number of times

repeatEach.description: Repeat for each item in a list
